'''bapovo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:xylanase|xylanase]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-p-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xylanase|xylanase]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| bapovo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:bæpeveth|bæpeveth]] || [[word:bæpevej|bæpevej]] || [[word:bæpevesh|bæpevesh]] || [[word:bæpeve|bæpeve]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:bapopovoth|bapopovoth]] || [[word:bapopovoj|bapopovoj]] || [[word:bapopovosh|bapopovosh]] || [[word:bapopovo|bapopovo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:bapovoth|bapovoth]] || [[word:bapovoj|bapovoj]] || [[word:bapovosh|bapovosh]] || [[word:bapovo|bapovo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:bapofvoth|bapofvoth]] || [[word:bapofvoj|bapofvoj]] || [[word:bapofvosh|bapofvosh]] || [[word:bapofvof|bapofvof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:bapovotho|bapovotho]] || [[word:bapovojo|bapovojo]] || [[word:bapovosho|bapovosho]] || [[word:bapovoko|bapovoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:bapovoth|bapovoth]] || [[word:bapovoj|bapovoj]] || [[word:bapovosh|bapovosh]] || [[word:bapovo|bapovo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:bapovothol|bapovothol]] || [[word:bapovojol|bapovojol]] || [[word:bapovoshol|bapovoshol]] || [[word:bapovokol|bapovokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:bapovothotho|bapovothotho]] || [[word:bapovojojo|bapovojojo]] || [[word:bapovoshosho|bapovoshosho]] || [[word:bapovoko|bapovoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:bapovothon|bapovothon]] || [[word:bapovojon|bapovojon]] || [[word:bapovoshon|bapovoshon]] || [[word:bapovokon|bapovokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:bapovothoro|bapovothoro]] || [[word:bapovojoro|bapovojoro]] || [[word:bapovoshoro|bapovoshoro]] || [[word:bapovokoro|bapovokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|654f723}}
